note: Curated from community BSOD threads and vendor forums. 'level' applies to Native NVMe (nvmedisk.sys) operation. Patterns: controller substring (case-insensitive), firmware exact (case-insensitive) or '*' wildcard. Prefix with '=' for exact controller match. Unknown entries are treated as 'proceed with caution' in the UI.

entries.note: Pre-firmware-update build. Update to 4B2QJXD7 via Samsung Magician before enabling Native NVMe.
Known stutter with older firmware. Update to 5B2QGXA8+ before enabling Native NVMe.
Stable on latest 620331WD and later firmware.
No BSOD reports. SN770 on latest firmware is the most common 'works fine' report.
Crucial P3 — some reports of paging errors under sustained 4K random write on early firmware. Benchmark with the watchdog active.
Intel 670p / 665p — known to hang under Native NVMe. Keep on stornvme.sys.
Phison controllers — stable on current firmware, update first.
Early Phison E18 firmware — avoid Native NVMe, update drive first.
